title: marshallia pumila
intro: Marshallia pumila, also known as dwarf boneset, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and colds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Marshallia pumila include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Marshallia pumila can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
